subcodes.first_line: O 'Abdu'l-Ḥusayn! The beginning of faith is to recognize the True One—exalted be His glory—and its end is steadfastness in His Cause [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا عبد الحسین اول امر ایمان بحق جل جلاله بوده و آخر آن استقامت بر امرش در
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual transformation, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @knowledge; recognition of God
